title: SieveAction::Display uses {:?} for string payloads — intentional
description: SieveAction::Display (lib.rs lines 104-107) formats FileInto/Reject/Redirect payloads with {:?} (debug), producing output like 'fileinto "Spam"'. Using {?} for Display is unusual and a reviewer might flag it. However this is intentional: the Display output mimics Sieve source syntax, and quoting the string operand makes the output unambiguous. This is a valid design choice, not a bug.
